examples: And for their thousand blows deal one deathblow!
As Dooku was about to administer the deathblow, Anakin leaped forward and saved his master.
The enterprise is facing many kinds of crises in the production operation, regardless and which kind of crisis occurs, has the possibility to bring the deathblow to the enterprise.
Cutting back staff while staring a shrinking market cap in the face may be painful, but it's not a deathblow.
By helping them to overcome their fear of falling prices, it will encourage them to deal a deathblow to the worldwide scourge of inflation.
